steps.title: Find slope and intercept
steps.content:
From the graph, the line crosses the $y$-axis at $(0,-1)$ and passes through $(1,-6)$. The slope is
$$m=\frac{-6-(-1)}{1-0}=-5$$
The $y$-intercept is $-1$.

steps.title: Write the function
steps.content:
Using slope-intercept form gives
$$f(x)=-5x-1$$
This matches the listed equation. The answer is B.
